meta.boundary: n8n gathers data from GHL and Paperclip, formats a daily digest, and delivers to owner via email and SMS at owner-configured time. Digest assembly belongs in n8n, not GHL.

nodes.name: HXN8N-Schedule-DailyBriefing
nodes.notes: Set cronExpression hour to owner's preferred briefing time (e.g., 7 = 7:00 AM CST)

parameters.subject: =[HOTWORX Daily Brief] {{ $json.today }} — {{ $json.location }}

parameters.name: Body
